'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=d.Fb6kbeQdYPv1hZiqvKrFLOl15pIHI2vKdbjasw.KY-1772305242-1.0.1.1-y_9t0_1azWjWZigD7yUPmxUNBsK6nUfDpcKMdacbwMo"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
